action.reasoning: Observation: Adding more models to ensemble didn't improve beyond 81.68%. The weak models (last.pt, warmup.pt) are likely diluting predictions. Time critically low (~2.5 min). Analysis: Remove weak models and try just the top 3-4 strongest with optimized weights. Also try temperature scaling on logits before averaging. Decision: Simplify ensemble to top models only, add temperature scaling, submit eval quickly.
